title: Senior Software Engineer - BigBasket - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BigBasket - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Senior Software Engineer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
